package rulefixtures

import (
	"time"
)

// scenario for time_parse_layout_in_loop: time.Parse(...) or ParseInLocation(...) observed inside loops with a stable layout.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: hot_path; severity: info.
func scenario371Negative(items []string) int {
	started := time.Now()
	total := 0
	for _, item := range items {
		if !started.IsZero() { total += len(item) }
	}
	return total
}
